title: penstemon reidmoranii
intro: Penstemon reidmoranii, also known as the San Juan beardtongue, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Penstemon reidmoranii are attributed to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the body. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used topically to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and minor injuries.
